channel_news.title: Kohl’s is stepping up its creator efforts as it attempts a sales reset
channel_news.summary: Kohl's is funneling more resources into its creator program, including through a new affiliate model, as it looks to boost revenue and raise awareness.

channel_news.title: Creator content has become critical for retail media networks
channel_news.summary: Two fast-growing advertising sectors -- retail media and the creator economy -- are increasingly becoming interlinked. Here's how more retail media networks are incorporating creator campaigns into their offerings.

channel_news.title: Candy brand Behave bet everything on TikTok Shop, went viral and secured a Target launch
channel_news.summary: After nearly going bankrupt in 2024, candy brand Behave lands on Target shelves this week. The company's founder credits TikTok Shop as a lifeline that helped save the business.

channel_news.title: Modern Retail Podcast: Has the latest sneaker bubble officially burst?
channel_news.summary: Allbirds' downward trajectory is indicative of how fierce the sneaker competition has become, as newer and legacy players vie for market share. This week's episode of the Modern Retail Podcast digs into the state of the sneaker market, looking at which players are up and which ones are down.

channel_news.title: Bloom, Pacsun and more chase Coachella crowds on the way to the show with roadside activations

channel_news.title: A group of seven-figure Amazon sellers is planning a one-day ad boycott as payment changes squeeze cash flow
channel_news.summary: Some sellers are calling for a one-day boycott of the company’s advertising platform next week, urging merchants to turn off their ads on April 15 to protest a new payment policy they say will strain their cash flow.

channel_news.title: A timeline of what led up to Grüns being acquired by Unilever
channel_news.summary: Even compared to other startups in the red-hot supplement space, Grüns has had a meteoric rise, announcing on Thursday that it is being acquired by Unilever less than three years after its products hit the market. Here's a timeline of what led up to the acquisition.

channel_news.summary: Amazon merchants are bracing for more cash flow troubles and margin pressure this year thanks to a bevy of new fees and policy changes.
